turns.npc_reply:
I am Eleanor Vance. I own an art gallery here in town. It's a pleasure to meet you... though of course this isn't the ideal setting for introductions.

My husband and I hosted Charles Whitmore at our dinner party last night, along with several other guests. He was such a dear friend, it's all so very tragic what happened afterwards.

turns.player_input: where were you when he died?
turns.npc_reply:
I wasn't anywhere near the study! I'd only been in there briefly before dinner to light some candles for atmosphere.

After Charles left the drawing room to take that call... I went downstairs myself, just once, at about twenty past nine. To fetch two bottles of wine from our cellar - Margaux 1932 if you must know. It was a very special vintage and I wanted it with dessert. I made certain not to go near the study as I came back up.

I learned what had happened when Daniel shouted out at ten past ten, but by then... poor Charles was already gone, wasn't he?
